ListItem.Para: Channel A and B sensors (T12) on both engines are verified to operate normally.
Airplane is not operated in known or forecast icing conditions.
EDTO beyond 120 minutes is not conducted.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: (CN-AA29810 Incorporated: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-865, VN-A866, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-869, VN-A870, VN-A871, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify T12 sensors A and B operate normally for both engines (AMM DDG 30-33-01).

ListItem.Para: On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set the left and right EEC MAINT switches to TEST.
On EPCS maintenance page 1, verify that a temperature value is displayed for the following sensors:

Note.Para: A T12 sensor that is not operating normally will display blank.

ListItem.Para: On EPCS maintenance page 1, verify that the Ch.A/Ch.B T12 readings do not differ more than 4.0 degrees C.

OperationProcedure.Para: Flight must remain within 120 minutes of landing at a suitable airport.
